chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.predicate: has unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: Products
triplets.object: 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Category in the data model, represented by a numeric reference (ID) and a corresponding display name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: ORDER_ID is the primary key and unique identifier for an Order record (BIGINT, auto-increment).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item representing a product and its quantity within a sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
-

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID is a self-referencing integer column in the TB_CATEGORY table that stores the identifier of the parent category, enabling a hierarchical category structure.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | - PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference]

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: A database column representing the human-readable display name of a product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product is a sellable item in the catalog identified by a unique SKU and categorized under exactly one category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code | **Key Attributes**:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category(Category Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A hierarchical product category entity stored in the TB_CATEGORY table, uniquely identified by CATEGORY_ID and used to relate to its parent category via a self-referential relationship.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference] | TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment Confirmed At
entities_post_resolution.definition: CREATED_AT represents the account creation timestamp (a datetime attribute) in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PAYMENT_CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO | | | DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking nu

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master data entity representing all registered platform customers, keyed by CUST_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: The shipping destination address associated with a customer to which shipments are delivered.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Master Record For
entities_post_resolution.definition: Header record that captures the high-level information for each customer sales order in the order processing data model.
synonyms: Header record for each customer sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | SALES_ORDER_HDR

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: A code indicating the status of an order or shipment, with possible values such as PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, and CANCELLED.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Refund
entities_post_resolution.definition: Refund is a monetary reimbursement issued to a customer, typically following a canceled order or a policy-based product return.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: Unit price is the price charged for a single unit of a product at the time of an order (in EUR).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identity, contact details, regional assignment, creation timestamp, and active status for the customer base.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores details about products including identifiers, names, category association, pricing, and active status for the product catalog.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores product category information and the hierarchical relationship between categories.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for sales orders, including identifiers, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line-item details for each order, including which product was ordered, the quantity, unit price, and the total amount for the line.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments associated with customer orders, including payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with orders, including the warehouse, ship time, tracking information, and shipment status.
